name: Logic
description: This algorithm is based on the disting mk4 algorithm of the same name. Each channel of the algorithm is independent and performs logical operations on its X & Y inputs. Complex logical operations can be constructed by combining operations. The inputs of each channel can be set to the outputs of other channels, allowing you to chain them internally to the algorithm.

specifications.name: Channels
specifications.description: The number of channels to process.

parameters.name: Threshold
parameters.description: Sets the input threshold. Signals above this voltage are treated as a logic ‘1’/true.

parameters.name: Hysteresis
parameters.description: Sets the input hysteresis. Once over the threshold, signals must fall by this amount before being treated as a logic ‘0’/false.

parameters.name: Output true
parameters.description: The output voltage for logic ‘1’/true. Logic ‘0’/false is always output as 0V.

parameters.name: Operation
parameters.description: Selects the logical operation from the table above.

parameters.name: Invert X
parameters.description: Inverts the X input (before it is used by the logical operation).

parameters.name: Invert Y
parameters.description: Inverts the Y input (before it is used by the logical operation).

parameters.name: Input X
parameters.description: Chooses the X input bus or channel for the operation.

parameters.name: Input Y
parameters.description: Chooses the Y input bus or channel for the operation.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

input_ports.name: Input X
input_ports.description: Input signal X for logical operations

input_ports.name: Input Y
input_ports.description: Input signal Y for logical operations

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The result of the logical operation
